queue_item.action: Build a fail-closed complete repository-tree manifest for immutable queue-update discovery and prepare it for deterministic replay.

progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only
progress.blocker: The connected GitHub tool did not expose an exhaustive recursive tree response and the local runtime could not resolve github.com for git clone; therefore the complete queue corpus was not asserted.

queue_item.handoff: M-009 should obtain a Git tree response with truncated=false, build the signed discovery manifest, fetch every listed queue-update blob by SHA, and run the M-007 effective queue replay over that verified corpus.

claim_state.observed: Known queue-update files and recent commits are visible, but exhaustive tree traversal was unavailable.
claim_state.inferred: Search and commit history can establish presence but not repository-wide absence.
claim_state.proposed: Promote only manifests derived from an explicit non-truncated recursive tree.
claim_state.superseded: Using search result count or recent commit count as discovery completeness proof.
claim_state.unresolved: The complete immutable queue-update corpus and effective queue state remain unproven.
